creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #23)
My problem went away with a current gptzfsboot of 12-CURRENT/amd64 (r313684) on the same laptop as in my previous comment.
I don't have lba errors anymore at boot.
And the default boot loader without patches boots fine.

I have no idea since when this is working again, sorry. I guess somewhere last month (or two).
